title: Reinforced Armor
description: This mod adds a new set of reinforced Netherite
body:
# Reinforced Armor
This mod adds a new set of reinforced Netherite.

![rein_armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3a83f2d4a472c82a5c8678ee49bfdfd3654f83.png)

## Reinforced Netherite Helmet
![rein_helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bd958b7018ccac95bf06cd097be48b67ad75b75.png)

## Reinforced Netherite Chestplate
![rein_chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83f83bb80a51e9c9cf4dd95a49dccab4c58f3173.png)

## Reinforced Netherite Leggings
![rein_leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0791dce431f47a2c74844745492005f5249d5a.png)

## Reinforced Netherite Boots
![rein_boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ab912d6c62c680b5a4efe4cb5c6515e110faad.png)


### Dependencies:     
Fabricloader: ">=0.15.3"               
Fabric-api [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


### Lang:

-en_us 

-es_es

-es_mx

-fr_fr

-pt_br

-pt_pt

-ru_ru

-de_de
